characters.name: Flaming Snot
characters.description: Flaming SnotNameFlaming SnotGenderMale (x2)OccupationRock BandProductionFirst Appearance"Ziterella"Voiced ByRob Paulsen Flaming Snotis a fictional punk band which exists within the universe ofPepper Annand is massively popular, particularly with students atHazelnut Middle School. They appear briefly in the first episode, "Ziterella," where they proclaim their love for Abe's Mall in Hazelnut, because it's the only place they can find Plimpton's Pimple Cream (which they use as a hair product) for 50 percent off. The band only ever appears to have two members, both of whom are voiced by Rob Paulsen.Mick Snotis the lead singer and songwriter. The other member, apparently the lead guitarist, is never named. In their first appearance, the guitarist appeared to be the front man, but in all future episodes, Mick Snot has clearly taken over that role.

characters.name: Abriola Stark
characters.description: Abriola StarkNameAbriola StarkGenderFemaleAgeUnknownProductionFirst Appearance"Ziterella"Last Appearance"The Finale"Episode Count26Voiced ByApril WinchellAbriola Stark, usually referred to asMs. Stark, is the eccentric 7th-grade Math teacher atHazelnut Middle Schooland a recurring character inPepper Ann. Ms. Stark is very into her lessons, and is passionate about every aspect of her curriculum. Though her main occupation is teaching math, she has done other things, such as when she wrote the lyrics to the songs in the school musical "Detention" (over which she and Mr. Clapper got into a fight) ("You Oughta Be in Musicals"); and taking her math class on a trip to Fuzzy World (which no one was able to attend to due a lice outbreak) ("The Wash-Out").

characters.name: Amber O'Malley
characters.description: Amber O'MalleyGenderFemaleAge12Only Appearance"Green-Eyed Monster"Voiced ByJodi Benson Amber O'Malleywas a new student who transferred toHazelnut Middle Schooland a minor character inPepper Ann. Her only appearance was in "Green-Eyed Monster". Due toCissy, the former most popular girl in seventh grade being away from the school for a week, Amber dazzles everyone with her personality and soon takes the place of most popular girl in seventh grade.Pepper Annbecomes jealous, as she wanted to take the title for the week, and decides to throw a party to take some of the attention away from Amber.

characters.name: Annie Briar
characters.description: Annie BriarGenderFemaleAgeUnknown, presumably comparable to LillianRomanticNumerous ex-husbandsOccupationActressProductionOnly Appearance"Cold Feet"Voiced BySusan Tolsky Annie Briarwas a rich and famous actress and a minor character inPepper Ann. She only appears once in a flashback in "Cold Feet". During WWII, Annie was an understudy forLillianwhen she was entertaining the Troops before heading out to fight. When Lillian metPrivate Leobackstage, both fell head over heels for each other, and when her manager told her that a Hollywood agent was there and was looking for someone to make famous, Lillian suggested Annie take her place. Annie took the stage and was offered a ten year movie contract, and became famous.

characters.name: Aunt Fanny
characters.description: Aunt FannyGenderFemaleAgeUnknownFamilyUncle Harry (husband)Damian (son)Damiana (daughter)ProductionFirst Appearance"Thanksgiving Dad"Last Appearance"The Word"Voiced ByJulia Duffy Damian (son)Damiana (daughter) Aunt Fannyis the aunt ofPepper Ann PearsonandMoose Pearsonand a minor character inPepper Ann. Her first and only major appearance is in "Thanksgiving Dad", but she appears in a flashback in "The Word" and, along with Uncle Harry, makes cameo appearances in various other episodes, usually in the distant background. She is voiced by Julia Duffy.

characters.name: Becky Little
characters.description: Becky LittleGenderFemaleAge19 (likely)ProductionFirst Appearance"The Amazing Becky Little"Last Appearance"Complimentary Colors"Voiced ByGlenne Headley Becky Littleis the older sister ofNicky Little, the daughter ofMr.andMrs. Little, and a minor character inPepper Ann. Much like Nicky, Becky is near-perfect at almost everything she does. She was class president in middle school and currently studies at Harvard.

characters.name: Brenda
characters.description: BrendaGenderFemaleAge12 (most likely)ProductionFirst Appearance"Old Best Friend"Last Appearance"Complimentary Colors"Voiced ByTara Charendoff-Strong Brendais a minor character inPepper Ann. She is the childhood friend ofPepper Ann'swho spent a lots of time together at Cubby Camp in the past. Brenda moves to Hazelnut in "Old Best Friend", and Pepper Ann is very excited that she's going to get to see her again and begins planning all sorts of activities for them to do together.

characters.name: Cameron Landisberg
characters.description: Cameron LandisbergNameCameron LandisbergGenderMaleAgeUnknownOccupationFilm Director (& Writer)ProductionFirst Appearance"Burn Hazelnut Burn"Last Appearance"The Untitled Milo Kamalani Project"Episode Count2Voiced ByJohn O'Hurley Cameron Landisbergis a writer and director of films and a minor character inPepper Ann. His name is a combination of, and homage to, three real-life writer-directors,James Cameron,John Landis, andSteven Spielberg. Judging by what we know of Landisberg's films, he seems to work primarily in the same genres that his namesakes often do: science-fiction and action-adventure. His personality, however, is more of a stereotypical self-important "artiste," and not modeled directly after any of them. Landisberg first appears in the episode "Burn Hazelnut Burn," whenPepper Annreviews his film,Macho Muchofor the school newspaper,Hazel Nuts N' Bolts. She describes it as "mucho stinko. I'd rather beat myself on the head with a wooden plank than sit through this mind-numbingly bad film again." This is the latest in a spate of harsh reviews from Pepper Ann, where she has similar opinions on the filmsRevengenatorandHard Asphalt(no indication that Landisberg has any connection to either of those).

characters.name: Coach Doogan
characters.description: Coach DooganNameKrista DooganGenderFemaleAgeUnknownProductionFirst Appearance"Soccer Season"Last Appearance"Strike it Or Not"Voiced ByKathy Najimy Coach Doogan, as her name suggests, is the PE (Physical Education) coach atHazelnut Middle Schoolwho teachesPepper Annand the other students and a recurring character inPepper Ann. In "In Support Of" she informs Pepper Ann's class that they will need "support" for the upcoming trampoline lesson. Pepper Ann misinterprets this as the coach saying that she needs a bra and spends the episode worrying and shopping for a bra. She eventually finds out what Coach Doogan meant by "support": a partner to help you on the trampoline.

characters.name: Constance Goldman
characters.description: Constance GoldmanGenderFemaleAge12 (presumably)ProductionFirst Appearance"Romeo and Juliet"Last Appearance"The Finale"Voiced ByCandi Milo Constance Goldmanis a student who attendsHazelnut Middle Schooland a minor character inPepper Ann. She is voiced byCandi Milo. Constance is shy and seems to be a bit awkward at times, especially around her crush,Lamar Abudabe. She lives with her motherDenise, as seen in "Too Cool to Be Mom".

characters.name: Crash
characters.description: CrashGenderMaleAge7 (most likely)ProductionFirst Appearance"Family Vacation"Last Appearance"The Merry Lives of Pepper Ann"Voiced ByAdam Wylie CrashisMoose's best friend. Unfortunately, no one seems to be able to pronounce his name correctly except for Moose. This becomes somewhat of a running gag, and he's called everything from "Flash" to "Trash". In "A 'Tween Halloween" he even wears a shirt with "My Name is Crash" printed on it in an effort to get people to call him by his correct name, but it doesn't seem to work.

characters.name: Crying Girl
characters.description: Crying GirlGenderFemaleAge12 (presumably)ProductionFirst Appearance"Romeo + Juliet"Last Appearance"Zen and the Art of Milo"Voiced ByCree Summer-Francks(most episodes)Kath Soucie("Flaw and Order", "The Perfect Couple") Crying Girlis a student who attendsHazelnut Middle Schooland a minor character inPepper Ann. As her nickname suggests, she seems to be very emotional and may burst into tears and run out of the room at any moment, often shouting that she "can't take it". Her real name is unknown, and everyone at school calls her Crying Girl --Nickyeven says it to her face in "Peer Counselor P.A." when Crying Girl thanks her for counseling her.

characters.name: Denise Goldman
characters.description: Denise GoldmanGenderFemaleAgeUnknownProductionFirst Appearance"Too Cool to Be Mom"Voiced ByWendie Malick Denise Goldmanis the mother ofConstance Goldmanand a minor character inPepper Ann. Denise is known as Hazelnut's "coolest mom" by Constance's seventh grade class, as she keeps up to date with trends, tells scary stories at sleepovers, and shows her guests films to watch.

characters.name: Didi O'Shaunassy
characters.description: Didi O'ShaunassyGenderFemaleAge12FamilyUnnamed MotherGoose O'Shaunassy (sister)Lanie (aunt)JayJay (uncle)Buck O'Shaunassy (father)Jillian (grandmother)Geo (grandfather)Ed (cousin)ProductionOnly Appearance"Doppelganger Didi"Episode Count1Voiced ByKathleen WilhoiteDidi O'Shaunassyis an Honor student at Our Lady of Walnut and a minor character inPepper Ann. She appears in "Doppelganger Didi", though her face is not fully shown. This is her only appearance; however she is mentioned in "Sense and Senselessness". In "Doppelganger Didi",Pepper Annfinds out that there is a twelve year old girl who goes to the private school, Our Lady of Walnut, who looks, sounds and acts just like her. After questioning several people, she comes to the conclusion that not only does Didi look like her, but they also have the same interests and quirks. Nothing is known about Didi outside of the fact that she wants to be a veterinarian, is saving for her own horse, and golf apparently makes her cry.

characters.name: Dieter Liederhosen
characters.description: Dieter LiederhosenGenderMaleAge12 (until "Have You Ever Been Unsupervised", when he turned 13)FamilyGerta Liederhosen(mother)Mr. Liederhosen (father)RomanticTrinket St. Blair(crush)Gwen Mezzrow(crusher)ProductionFirst Appearance"Ziterella"Last Appearance"The Finale"Voiced ByJeff BennettDieter Liederhosenis a German kid who attendsHazelnut Middle Schooland is in the same grade/classes asPepper Ann,Nicky LittleandMilo Kamalani. He appears in several episodes, the most notable being "To Germany With Love" in which he sends his father in Germany a video of his life in Hazelnut. Dieter moved to Hazelnut from Germany with his motherGerta(who works as an obstetrician at the local hospital and deliveredMoose) sometime around kindergarten ("The Way They Were"). In "Have You Ever Been Unsupervised" he celebrates his 13th birthday.

characters.name: Effie Shrugg
characters.description:
Effie ShruggGenderFemaleAge8 years, 11 monthsProductionFirst Appearance"Effie Shrugged"Last Appearance"A Valentine's Day Tune"Voiced ByHedy Burress Effie Shruggis a student who transfer toHazelnut Middle Schooland a minor character inPepper Ann. Effie is very large for her age, and ahead academically. In "Effie Shrugged", she transfers from fifth grade at Hazelnut Elementary School to seventh atHazelnut Middle School, despite only being 8 years old.
She soon becomes friends withPepper Ann,NickyandMiloand introduces them to intellectual things like Darwin and Dickens.

characters.name: Gerta Liederhosen
characters.description: Gerta LiederhosenGenderFemaleAgeUnknownFamilyDieter Liederhosen(son)RomanticMr. Liederhosen (husband)ProductionFirst Appearance"Have You Ever Been Unsupervised"Last Appearance"Unhappy Campers"Voiced ByApril Winchell Gerta Liederhosen, often referred to asMrs. Liederhosen, isDieter Liederhosen's mother and a minor character inPepper Ann. Gerta moved to Hazelnut from Germany sometime around 1990 with Dieter, as part of an "obstetrician exchange program", as we learn in "The Way They Were".

characters.description: Gerta LiederhosenGenderFemaleAgeUnknownFamilyDieter Liederhosen(son)RomanticMr. Liederhosen (husband)ProductionFirst Appearance"Have You Ever Been Unsupervised"Last Appearance"Unhappy Campers"Voiced ByApril Winchell Gerta Liederhosen, often referred to asMrs. Liederhosen, isDieter Liederhosen's mother and a minor character inPepper Ann. Gerta moved to Hazelnut from Germany sometime around 1990 with Dieter, as part of an "obstetrician exchange program", as we learn in "The Way They Were".
